initiatives.name: Shasta Mutual Aid
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community support in Shasta County. They coordinate direct assistance, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while building power through community organizing and creating spaces for collective care.

initiatives.name: UNHARM
initiatives.description: A harm reduction and mutual aid collective serving the Shasta region. They provide direct support, resource distribution, and community care while building networks of solidarity through harm reduction practices and collective organizing.

initiatives.name: Shasta for Palestine
initiatives.description: Solidarity-driven, anti-colonial collective committed to the liberation of Palestine and all oppressed peoples.

initiatives.name: The Norcal Underground
initiatives.description: We are an anti-fascist, solidarity-driven collective dedicated to fighting for the liberation of our communities, Palestine, & all oppressed peoples.
